contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 240
- Description: DApp warm-up review module — mobile triage + signed Send across 5 repos
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/202
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1045
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/268
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache/pull/4
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/107
  
  Details:
  Built end-to-end mobile-first warm-up draft review for dapp.truesight.me. Operator opens warmup_review.html on phone -> sees pending Gmail drafts sorted red-first by 12 lint rules + Hosts Circles=Yes badge -> taps Send -> email ships from operator's Gmail without leaving the DApp.
  
  Architecture mirrors the dapp_permission_change pattern: DApp signs [WARMUP SEND EVENT] with operator RSA key -> POST to Edgar /dao/submit_contribution -> Edgar verifies sig + persists to Telegram Chat Logs -> Edgar fires webhook ?action=apply_warmup_send to the storesHitList GAS -> WarmupSendHandler.gs verifies ACTIVE membership in Contributors Digital Signatures + parses draft_id from text + GmailApp.getDraft(id).send() -> Warmup Sends audit row + email lands in recipient inbox.
  
  Five repos shipped:
  1. go_to_market #107 (merged) - gmail_message_id column added to Email Agent Drafts schema; populated at draft creation in suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py + suggest_manager_followup_drafts.py; backfill script ran live (96 filled, 3 missing-in-gmail, 0 failures).
  2. tokenomics #268 (merged) - WarmupReviewApi.gs (read-only getWarmupReviewQueue; live + tested) + WarmupSendHandler.gs (signed send handler; clasp-pushed and deployed at v21).
  3. treasury-cache #4 (merged) - warmup.send permission with required_roles: [governor].
  4. sentiment_importer #1045 (merged) - dao_controller#trigger_immediate_processing dispatch branch + warmup_send_webhook_url config (NEEDS ./deploy.sh).
  5. dapp #202 (merged) - warmup_review.html (417 lines) + menu.js + index.html link under Retail & field activity.
  
  Pairs with: agentic_ai_context #91 (2026-05-11 A/B read-out follow-up — if reply rate stays healthy, that's the signal to flip the unflagged tier to fully auto-send), agentic_ai_context #92 (state machine doc updated for the Operator review loop), and the local preview_warmup_drafts.py from earlier today (now superseded by the DApp page for mobile use).
  
  Outstanding: ./deploy.sh on Edgar (manual step Gary owns); end-to-end smoke test from phone.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 400.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
